headlines: Drift Protocol hit for ~$285M in major Solana hack
Blockchain sleuth accuses Circle of slow USDC freezes across $420M+ of illicit funds
Coinbase wins conditional OCC national trust charter approval
Ethereum Foundation doubles staked ETH as it ramps staking deployments

JPMorgan: crypto flows plunged to $11B in Q1 2026, about one-third year-earlier level','Metaplanet buys 5,075 BTC in Q1 to become the 3rd-largest public Bitcoin treasury','Circle announces cirBTC — a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin product for institutions','Mixed ETF flows: Bitcoin ETFs see small inflows while Ether ETFs post outflows

articles.title: Drift Protocol hit for ~$285M in major Solana hack
articles.summary: Drift Protocol was exploited on April 1–2, 2026, losing roughly $270–285 million in a fast governance/nonce-style attack. The attacker converted much of the loot to USDC and bridged funds to Ethereum, spreading contagion across Solana DeFi projects and prompting forensic work and outreach to the wallets holding stolen assets.

articles.title: Blockchain sleuth accuses Circle of slow USDC freezes across $420M+ of illicit funds
articles.summary: On April 3, investigator ZachXBT posted on X alleging Circle was slow or failed to freeze over $420M of stolen or illicit USDC across multiple incidents since 2022 — a claim that drew fresh scrutiny after the Drift exploit's funds moved via Circle’s CCTP bridge.

articles.title: Coinbase wins conditional OCC national trust charter approval
articles.summary: Coinbase said on April 2, 2026 it received conditional approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to form a national trust company, a major regulatory step that would put parts of its custody business under federal supervision (final approval still pending standard OCC pre-opening steps).

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation doubles staked ETH as it ramps staking deployments
articles.summary: On April 3, 2026 the Ethereum Foundation said it increased its staking allocation to about 47,050 ETH — roughly two-thirds of its 70,000 ETH target — moving more treasury ETH into staking to earn yield instead of selling.

articles.title: JPMorgan: crypto flows plunged to $11B in Q1 2026, about one-third year-earlier level
articles.summary: JPMorgan analysts reported crypto fund flows fell to around $11 billion in Q1 2026 — roughly one-third of the same quarter last year — signaling weaker investor demand early in 2026 despite pockets of ETF activity.

articles.title: Metaplanet adds 5,075 BTC in Q1 to become 3rd-largest public Bitcoin treasury
articles.summary: Tokyo-listed Metaplanet bought about 5,075 BTC (~$405M) in Q1 2026, lifting its holdings to 40,177 BTC and making it one of the largest corporate public treasuries by Bitcoin held.

articles.title: Circle announces cirBTC — a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin product for institutions
articles.summary: Circle unveiled cirBTC on April 2, 2026: a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin token with on‑chain reserve verification aimed at institutions and DeFi users, expanding Circle’s product stack beyond USDC.

articles.title: Mixed ETF flows: Bitcoin ETFs see small inflows while Ether ETFs post outflows
articles.summary: Data for April 2–3, 2026 showed U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded modest net inflows while spot Ethereum ETFs posted net outflows, highlighting divergent institutional demand between BTC and ETH products over the last 24–48 hours.
